section.heading: Additional funding for aging and disability services programs

content.p: In addition to amounts otherwise available, there is appropriated for fiscal year 2021, out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, $276,000,000, to remain available until expended, to carry out the programs described in division B of this subchapter.

subsection.heading: Use of funds
subsection.chapeau: Of the amounts made available by subsection (a)—

paragraph.content: $88,000,000 shall be made available to carry out the programs described in division B of this subchapter in fiscal year 2021, of which not less than an amount equal to $100,0000,000 minus the amount previously provided in fiscal year 2021 to carry out section 1397m–1(b) of this title shall be made available to carry out such section; and

$188,000,000 shall be made available to carry out the programs described in division B of this subchapter in fiscal year 2022, of which not less than $100,000,000 shall be for activities described in section 1397m–1(b) of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title XX, § 2010, as added Pub. L. 117–2, title IX, § 9301, Mar. 11, 2021, 135 Stat. 126.)
